creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port does not have a valid distfile because it is not versioned
and can/will be overwritten by the author at any time. That needs to be
fixed soon. So we have to manually version that file in the form
ompload-20100913(.gz) and put it on a mirror server. Do you have access
to a mirror server so that you can host this file or should I care about
it?

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
